Her socioeconomic level is gse C3 and her level of schooling is high school incomplete. She does not belong to any indigenous people. She does not feel close to any religion. Regarding politics, on the left-right scale she feels closer to the right, she does not sympathize or feel close to any party, she  is not at all interested in politics.  ```.
